name: Hurricane
title: Hurricane Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Hurricane Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A Mardi Gras cocktail with BACARDÍ Carta Negra and Carta Blanca rum, brightened by orange, lime, passionfruit, and grenadine.
marketing_description: Big in New Orleans and served to this day in the French Quarter, the Hurricane is truly the drink of Mardi Gras.

steps: Combine all ingredients in a shaker with plenty of ice.
Strain into a hurricane glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a lemon wheel, orange peel and a cherry.

garnish: lemon wheel, orange peel and a cherry
raw_text_excerpt: Big in New Orleans and served to this day in the French quarter, the Hurricane is truly the drink of Mardi Gras because of its exotic blend of passion fruit, orange, and a hint of lime. How to make a Hurricane 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum 37.5 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 50 ml orange juice 25 ml lime juice 25 ml passionfruit syrup 1 tsp grenadine syrup ... Combine all ingredients in a shaker with plenty of ice. Shake vigorously. Strain into a hurricane glass filled with ice. Garnish with a lemon wheel, orange peel and a cherry.
